nasb.text: Haman controlled himself, however, went to his house and sent for his friends and his wife Zeresh.

esv.text: Nevertheless, Haman restrained himself and went home, and he sent and brought his friends and his wife Zeresh.

cnv.text: 哈曼忍住怒氣，回家去了，就派人去請他的朋友和妻子細利斯來。

ccb.text: 哈曼忍怒回到家中，把朋友和妻子细利斯叫来，
